data.title: Trump Suggests Potential Fed Rate Cut with Waller's Appointment
data.description: U.S. President Donald Trump has indicated that Federal Reserve interest rates might decrease following the appointment of Christopher Waller. According to ChainCatcher, this statement was reported by Jinshi News. The potential rate cut is seen as a significant move in the current economic climate.

data.title: Trump Threatens to Dismiss Federal Reserve Chair Powell
data.description: U.S. President Donald Trump has stated that Federal Reserve Chair Jerome Powell will be dismissed if he does not leave his position on time. According to ChainCatcher, this announcement underscores ongoing tensions between Trump and Powell regarding monetary policy decisions. Trump's comments reflect his dissatisfaction with Powell's handling of interest rates and economic strategies.

data.title: Morgan Stanley's First Quarter Stock Trading Revenue Exceeds Expectations
data.description: Morgan Stanley reported its first-quarter stock trading revenue at $5.15 billion, surpassing market expectations of $4.78 billion. According to Jin10, this performance highlights the bank's strong trading capabilities amid fluctuating market conditions. The higher-than-expected revenue reflects Morgan Stanley's ability to navigate the complexities of the financial markets effectively.

data.title: Binance to Host Toncoin Trading Tournament with $400,000 Prize Pool
data.description:
According to the announcement from Binance, the platform is set to launch a Toncoin (TON) Trading Tournament, offering eligible users a chance to share a total prize pool of 400,000 USDC in token vouchers. The promotion period is scheduled from 2026-04-15 12:00 (UTC) to 2026-04-29 12:00 (UTC). This tournament is open to all verified new, regular, and VIP users, excluding liquidity providers in the Binance Spot Liquidity Provider Program and Binance Brokers.

**Eligible Trading Pairs and Participation**

The trading pairs eligible for this tournament are TON/USDT and TON/USDC. To participate, users must click the 'Join Now' button on the landing page to register and trade a cumulative amount of at least 500 USD equivalent in any of the eligible pairs on Binance Spot during the promotion period. Users who do not meet this threshold will not qualify for any rewards.

**Reward Structure and Distribution**

The rewards are structured based on cumulative trading volume during the promotion period. The top participant will receive 20,000 USDC, while the second and third places will receive 16,000 USDC and 12,000 USDC, respectively. Participants ranked from 4th to 1,000th place will share varying amounts of the prize pool, with all remaining eligible participants sharing 160,000 USDC, capped at 20 USDC per user. Token vouchers will be distributed by 2026-05-13 and must be redeemed within 21 days.

**Promotion Rules and Conditions**

Trading volume from zero-fee trading pairs is excluded from the final calculation. All eligible buy and sell orders will count towards the cumulative trading volume. Binance reserves the right to disqualify users involved in dishonest behavior or who tamper with the program code. The campaign's commencement is contingent upon the successful listing of the relevant token on Binance Spot.

data.title: U.S. President Donald Trump Addresses Anthropic Issue
data.description: U.S. President Donald Trump stated that the issue concerning Anthropic will be resolved. According to Jin10, Trump made this remark while discussing the challenges related to Anthropic. The President did not provide specific details on the measures to be taken but assured that the situation would be addressed effectively.

data.title: US media: US and Iran agree in principle to extend ceasefire
data.description: According to an Associated Press report today (April 15), mediators are close to reaching an agreement on extending the temporary ceasefire between the United States and Iran and pushing for the resumption of negotiations. Sources said both sides have "agreed in principle" to extend the ceasefire agreement, which expires on April 22, to buy more time for diplomacy. The report stated that the US blockade of Iranian ports and threats from Iran have cast uncertainty on the ceasefire's prospects. Currently, all parties are seeking compromises on key differences such as Iran's nuclear program, the Strait of Hormuz, and wartime reparations. (CCTV International News) (Jinshi)

data.title: New Initiative Targets High Costs of Smart Contract Security Audits
data.description:
A new initiative has been launched to tackle the ongoing issue of expensive smart contract security audits in the cryptocurrency sector. According to CoinDesk, this effort seeks to alleviate the financial burden associated with ensuring the security of smart contracts, which are essential for the functioning of decentralized applications and blockchain platforms. The high cost of these audits has been a significant barrier for developers, particularly those working on smaller projects with limited budgets.

Smart contracts, which are self-executing contracts with the terms of the agreement directly written into code, require rigorous security audits to prevent vulnerabilities and potential exploits. These audits are crucial for maintaining trust and security within the blockchain ecosystem. However, the cost of conducting thorough audits has been prohibitive for many developers, leading to a gap in security measures for numerous projects. The new initiative aims to provide more affordable solutions, enabling wider access to security audits and fostering a more secure environment for blockchain development.

data.title: Middle East Developments Lead to Oil Price Drop and Market Rally
data.description:
Optimism surrounding recent developments in the Middle East has led to a significant decrease in oil prices, while simultaneously triggering rallies in various risk markets. According to CoinDesk, this shift in market dynamics is attributed to positive news emerging from the region, which has influenced investor sentiment and market behavior.

The decline in oil prices is seen as a direct response to the evolving situation in the Middle East, where geopolitical tensions have historically impacted global energy markets. The recent developments have alleviated some of these concerns, leading to a more favorable outlook among investors. This optimism has not only affected oil prices but has also spurred activity in risk markets, where investors are increasingly willing to engage in higher-risk investments.

Market analysts suggest that the current trend may continue if the positive developments in the Middle East persist. However, they also caution that the situation remains fluid, and any changes in the geopolitical landscape could quickly alter market conditions. As such, investors are advised to stay informed and be prepared for potential volatility in the coming days.

data.title: IMF Projects Global Public Debt to Approach 100% of GDP by 2029
data.description:
The International Monetary Fund (IMF) has issued a warning that global public debt is on track to reach approximately 100% of the world's Gross Domestic Product (GDP) by 2029. According to CoinDesk, this projection highlights the growing concerns over fiscal sustainability and the potential economic implications for countries worldwide. The IMF's forecast underscores the need for governments to address rising debt levels, which have been exacerbated by recent economic challenges and increased public spending.

The anticipated rise in global public debt is attributed to several factors, including the economic impact of the COVID-19 pandemic, which led to significant government borrowing to support economies and provide relief to citizens. Additionally, ongoing geopolitical tensions and economic uncertainties have contributed to increased fiscal pressures. The IMF emphasizes the importance of implementing sound fiscal policies and structural reforms to manage debt levels effectively and ensure long-term economic stability. As countries navigate these challenges, the IMF's warning serves as a reminder of the critical need for prudent fiscal management and international cooperation to address the looming debt crisis.

data.title: Institutional Investments and Whale Activity Drive Market Breakout
data.description:
The cryptocurrency market is experiencing a significant breakout, driven by institutional investments and substantial purchases by large holders, often referred to as 'whales.' According to CoinDesk, this surge is further supported by Japan's increasing adoption of digital currencies, which is adding a new layer of demand to the market.

Institutional investors have been steadily increasing their presence in the cryptocurrency space, bringing with them a level of credibility and stability that has been previously lacking. This influx of institutional capital is seen as a key factor in the current market dynamics, as it not only boosts liquidity but also encourages other investors to participate. The involvement of these large financial entities is often viewed as a sign of maturation for the cryptocurrency market, suggesting a shift towards broader acceptance and integration into the global financial system.

In addition to institutional flows, the activity of 'whales'—individuals or entities holding large amounts of cryptocurrency—has been a significant driver of the recent market movements. These large holders have the ability to influence market prices through their buying and selling activities, and their recent purchases have contributed to the upward momentum. The strategic buying by these whales is often interpreted as a vote of confidence in the market's future prospects, further fueling investor optimism.

Japan's role in this evolving narrative cannot be understated. The country's regulatory environment has been increasingly favorable towards cryptocurrencies, encouraging both individual and institutional participation. This supportive stance has led to a rise in demand for digital assets within Japan, adding another dimension to the global demand narrative. As more countries consider similar regulatory frameworks, the potential for increased adoption and integration of cryptocurrencies into mainstream financial systems continues to grow.

data.title: The government of the Kingdom of Bhutan transferred 250 BTC for sale, worth $18.46 million.
data.description: According to Onchain Lens, the government of the Kingdom of Bhutan transferred 250 BTC for sale, worth $18.46 million.

data.title: U.S. and Iran Reach Preliminary Agreement to Extend Ceasefire
data.description: Negotiators have made progress in extending the ceasefire agreement between the United States and Iran, according to BlockBeats. On April 15, regional officials announced that both nations have reached a 'principled agreement' to facilitate further diplomatic negotiations. This development aims to create a conducive environment for ongoing discussions and potential resolutions.

data.title: Bitcoin's Long-Term Appeal Amid IMF's Global Debt Projection
data.description: According to NS3.AI, a recent commentary highlights the International Monetary Fund's (IMF) projection that global public debt could near 100% of GDP by 2029, suggesting a potential boost to Bitcoin's long-term attractiveness. The analysis contrasts this perspective with the risk posed by rising bond yields, which may increase the opportunity cost of holding non-yielding assets like Bitcoin. As bond yields climb, investors might face greater pressure to reconsider their positions in cryptocurrencies, weighing the benefits of traditional investments against the allure of digital assets.

data.title: Binance to Launch Tria Trading Competition with Token Rewards
data.description:
According to the announcement from Binance, the platform is set to introduce the Tria Trading Competition on Binance Alpha, offering participants the chance to earn exclusive token rewards. The competition will be conducted in two separate promotion periods. The first period is scheduled from 2026-04-15 13:00 (UTC) to 2026-04-22 13:00 (UTC), followed by the second period from 2026-04-22 13:00 (UTC) to 2026-04-29 13:00 (UTC). Participants will be ranked based on their total purchase volume of TRIA tokens during each period. The top 2,000 users in each period will share a total of 3,600,000 TRIA tokens, with each eligible participant receiving 1,800 TRIA tokens.

The competition is open to users trading via Binance Wallet (Keyless) or Binance Alpha, with third-party dApp transactions excluded. Only cumulative purchases will count towards the competition, and there are no volume caps for participants. Token bridging transactions are not eligible, and trading volume from Alpha-to-Alpha token pairs will not be counted towards Alpha Points or competition rankings. Rewards will be distributed in TRIA tokens and will be claimable by eligible users before 2026-05-13 13:00:00 (UTC). Users must claim their rewards within 14 days of them becoming available, or they will be forfeited.

To participate, users must click [Join] on the Binance App event page, ensuring their trading volume is counted. Participants are required to update their Binance App to the latest version and create a Binance Wallet (Keyless). The terms and conditions of the promotion govern user participation, and Binance reserves the right to amend or cancel the activity at its discretion. Users are advised to review the Terms of Use and Risk Warning before participating.

data.title: S&P 500 Nears Record High Amid Market Rebound
data.description: The S&P 500 index approached within 0.5% of its January 2026 record high of 7,002, following a market rebound that has added nearly $6 trillion in value since March 30. According to NS3.AI, the Kobeissi Letter reported a significant decrease in hedge fund short exposure to U.S. ETFs over five trading days, as previously sidelined capital returned to stocks. Global Markets Investor highlighted that the Buffett Indicator reached a record 232.6%, indicating stretched valuations despite the ongoing strong market momentum.

data.title: Iran Threatens to Halt Trade in Key Waterways Amid U.S. Maritime Blockade
data.description: An Iranian military spokesperson has announced that Iran will prevent import and export activities in the Persian Gulf, Gulf of Oman, and Red Sea if the United States persists with its maritime blockade. According to NS3.AI, the spokesperson emphasized that ongoing U.S. actions pose a threat to the safety of Iranian merchant ships and oil tankers.

data.title: Bank of America Exceeds Expectations with Q1 Stock Trading Revenue
data.description: Bank of America reported its first-quarter stock trading revenue, excluding DVA, at $2.83 billion. According to Jin10, this figure surpassed market expectations, which were set at $2.51 billion.

data.title: Associated Press: Mediators have made progress in extending the ceasefire agreement between the US and Iran and restarting negotiations.
data.description: According to the Associated Press: Mediators have made progress in extending the ceasefire agreement between the United States and Iran and restarting negotiations. Regional officials said on Wednesday that the United States and Iran have reached an "agreement in principle" to create conditions for further diplomatic mediation. (Jinshi)

data.title: eToro CEO: Bought 4,000 BTC at approximately $5 each between 2011 and 2012, and sold them when their value reached $50 million.
data.description: eToro CEO Yoni Assia stated on @parisblockweek that eToro bought BTC at approximately $5 per BTC between 2011 and 2012, accumulating a total holding of 4,000 BTC, before selling the position when its value reached $50 million. (Cointelegraph)

data.title: Pacific Investment Management CIO: Secondary Inflation Effects from Rising Oil Prices Unlikely to Manifest
data.description: The Chief Investment Officer of Global Fixed Income at Pacific Investment Management Company has expressed skepticism regarding the emergence of secondary inflation effects due to soaring oil prices. According to Jin10, the CIO noted that while oil prices have surged, the anticipated inflationary impact may not materialize as expected. Additionally, the company plans to closely monitor the extent of any fiscal intervention measures that may be implemented.
